Good, formatting done. Now let me regenerate the exec reference docs and fix the test failures. The test failures fall into these categories:
1. `test_exit_plan_mode_hook.py` - imports `extract_plan_title` which was renamed to `extract_pr_title` 2. `test_view.py` / `test_top_level_commands.py` - `PrViewResult` missing `plan_id` (needs `pr_id` instead since we renamed it in `view/operation.py`) 3. `test_land_*.py` - `land_execute()` signature mismatch (`linked_pr_number` instead of `plan_number`) 4. `test_display.py` (learn) - `LearnResult` unexpected keyword `plan_id` (renamed to `pr_id`)
Let me fix these in parallel:

tool_use.name: Task
tool_use.param: Fix test files that reference renamed symbols. These are test failures from a plan_number/...[truncated 1603 chars]...then make the minimum necessary edits. Don't change anything not related to these renames.

[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_exit_plan_mode_hook.py","old_string":"# ============================================================================
# Pure Logic Tests for extract_plan_title() - NO MOCKING REQUIRED
# ============================================================================


class TestExtractPlanTitle:
    """Tests for the pure extract_plan_title() function."""

    def test_extracts_h1_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Extract title from first H1 heading."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# My Plan Title\n\nSome content here.\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) == "My Plan Title"","new_string":"# ============================================================================
# Pure Logic Tests for extract_pr_title() - NO MOCKING REQUIRED
# ============================================================================


class TestExtractPlanTitle:
    """Tests for the pure extract_pr_title() function."""

    def test_extracts_h1_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Extract title from first H1 heading."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# My Plan Title\n\nSome content here.\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) == "My Plan Title""}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_exit_plan_mode_hook.py","old_string":"    def test_extracts_from_task_section(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Extract title from ## Task section when no H1."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "## Task\nDo the thing with feature X\n\n## Details\nMore info.",
            encoding="utf-8",
        )
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) == "Do the thing with feature X"

    def test_skips_generic_plan_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Skip generic '# Plan' heading and fall back to ## Task."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# Plan\n\n## Task\nActual task description\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) == "Actual task description"

    def test_skips_generic_implementation_plan_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Skip generic '# Implementation Plan' heading."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "# Implementation Plan\n\n## Task\nBuild the widget\n", encoding="utf-8"
        )
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) == "Build the widget"

    def test_returns_none_for_no_file(self) -> None:
        """Return None when plan_file_path is None."""
        assert extract_plan_title(None) is None

    def test_returns_none_for_nonexistent_file(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when file doesn't exist."""
        nonexistent = tmp_path / "does_not_exist.md"
        assert extract_plan_title(nonexistent) is None

    def test_returns_none_for_empty_file(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when file is empty."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) is None

    def test_returns_none_when_no_title_found(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when no valid title pattern found."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "Some random content\nwithout any headings\nor task section.", encoding="utf-8"
        )
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) is None

    def test_prefers_h1_over_task_section(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """H1 heading takes precedence over ## Task section."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# Better Title\n\n## Task\nTask description\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) == "Better Title"","new_string":"    def test_extracts_from_task_section(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Extract title from ## Task section when no H1."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "## Task\nDo the thing with feature X\n\n## Details\nMore info.",
            encoding="utf-8",
        )
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) == "Do the thing with feature X"

    def test_skips_generic_plan_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Skip generic '# Plan' heading and fall back to ## Task."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# Plan\n\n## Task\nActual task description\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) == "Actual task description"

    def test_skips_generic_implementation_plan_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Skip generic '# Implementation Plan' heading."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "# Implementation Plan\n\n## Task\nBuild the widget\n", encoding="utf-8"
        )
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) == "Build the widget"

    def test_returns_none_for_no_file(self) -> None:
        """Return None when plan_file_path is None."""
        assert extract_pr_title(None) is None

    def test_returns_none_for_nonexistent_file(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when file doesn't exist."""
        nonexistent = tmp_path / "does_not_exist.md"
        assert extract_pr_title(nonexistent) is None

    def test_returns_none_for_empty_file(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when file is empty."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) is None

    def test_returns_none_when_no_title_found(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when no valid title pattern found."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "Some random content\nwithout any headings\nor task section.", encoding="utf-8"
        )
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) is None

    def test_prefers_h1_over_task_section(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """H1 heading takes precedence over ## Task section."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# Better Title\n\n## Task\nTask description\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) == "Better Title""}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_exit_plan_mode_hook.py","old_string":"    def test_plan_saved_marker_blocks_with_step2(self) -> None:
        """Plan-saved marker blocks exit with Step 2 prompt and deletes the marker."""
        result = determine_exit_action(
            HookInput.for_test(
                plan_saved_marker_exists=True,
                plan_saved_plan_number=42,
                plan_file_path=Path("/some/plan.md"),
            )
        )
        assert result.action == ExitAction.BLOCK
        assert "PR #42 saved" in result.message
        assert "erk br co --for-plan 42" in result.message
        assert "erk pr dispatch 42" in result.message
        assert "Session complete" in result.message
        assert result.delete_plan_saved_marker is True
        assert result.delete_implement_now_marker is False

    def test_plan_saved_marker_without_plan_number_fallback(self) -> None:
        """Plan-saved marker without plan number uses fallback message."""
        result = determine_exit_action(
            HookInput.for_test(
                plan_saved_marker_exists=True,
                plan_saved_plan_number=None,
                plan_file_path=Path("/some/plan.md"),
            )
        )
        assert result.action == ExitAction.BLOCK
        assert "PR saved" in result.message
        assert "Planning session complete" in result.message
        assert result.delete_plan_saved_marker is True","new_string":"    def test_plan_saved_marker_blocks_with_step2(self) -> None:
        """Plan-saved marker blocks exit with Step 2 prompt and deletes the marker."""
        result = determine_exit_action(
            HookInput.for_test(
                plan_saved_marker_exists=True,
                plan_saved_pr_number=42,
                plan_file_path=Path("/some/plan.md"),
            )
        )
        assert result.action == ExitAction.BLOCK
        assert "PR #42 saved" in result.message
        assert "erk br co --for-plan 42" in result.message
        assert "erk pr dispatch 42" in result.message
        assert "Session complete" in result.message
        assert result.delete_plan_saved_marker is True
        assert result.delete_implement_now_marker is False

    def test_plan_saved_marker_without_plan_number_fallback(self) -> None:
        """Plan-saved marker without plan number uses fallback message."""
        result = determine_exit_action(
            HookInput.for_test(
                plan_saved_marker_exists=True,
                plan_saved_pr_number=None,
                plan_file_path=Path("/some/plan.md"),
            )
        )
        assert result.action == ExitAction.BLOCK
        assert "PR saved" in result.message
        assert "Planning session complete" in result.message
        assert result.delete_plan_saved_marker is True"}

[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_exit_plan_mode_hook.py","old_string":"# ============================================================================
# Pure Logic Tests for extract_plan_title() - NO MOCKING REQUIRED
# ============================================================================


class TestExtractPlanTitle:
    """Tests for the pure extract_plan_title() function."""

    def test_extracts_h1_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Extract title from first H1 heading."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# My Plan Title\n\nSome content here.\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) == "My Plan Title"","new_string":"# ============================================================================
# Pure Logic Tests for extract_pr_title() - NO MOCKING REQUIRED
# ============================================================================


class TestExtractPlanTitle:
    """Tests for the pure extract_pr_title() function."""

    def test_extracts_h1_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Extract title from first H1 heading."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# My Plan Title\n\nSome content here.\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) == "My Plan Title""}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_exit_plan_mode_hook.py","old_string":"    def test_extracts_from_task_section(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Extract title from ## Task section when no H1."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "## Task\nDo the thing with feature X\n\n## Details\nMore info.",
            encoding="utf-8",
        )
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) == "Do the thing with feature X"

    def test_skips_generic_plan_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Skip generic '# Plan' heading and fall back to ## Task."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# Plan\n\n## Task\nActual task description\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) == "Actual task description"

    def test_skips_generic_implementation_plan_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Skip generic '# Implementation Plan' heading."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "# Implementation Plan\n\n## Task\nBuild the widget\n", encoding="utf-8"
        )
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) == "Build the widget"

    def test_returns_none_for_no_file(self) -> None:
        """Return None when plan_file_path is None."""
        assert extract_plan_title(None) is None

    def test_returns_none_for_nonexistent_file(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when file doesn't exist."""
        nonexistent = tmp_path / "does_not_exist.md"
        assert extract_plan_title(nonexistent) is None

    def test_returns_none_for_empty_file(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when file is empty."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) is None

    def test_returns_none_when_no_title_found(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when no valid title pattern found."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "Some random content\nwithout any headings\nor task section.", encoding="utf-8"
        )
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) is None

    def test_prefers_h1_over_task_section(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """H1 heading takes precedence over ## Task section."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# Better Title\n\n## Task\nTask description\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_plan_title(plan_file) == "Better Title"","new_string":"    def test_extracts_from_task_section(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Extract title from ## Task section when no H1."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "## Task\nDo the thing with feature X\n\n## Details\nMore info.",
            encoding="utf-8",
        )
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) == "Do the thing with feature X"

    def test_skips_generic_plan_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Skip generic '# Plan' heading and fall back to ## Task."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# Plan\n\n## Task\nActual task description\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) == "Actual task description"

    def test_skips_generic_implementation_plan_heading(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Skip generic '# Implementation Plan' heading."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "# Implementation Plan\n\n## Task\nBuild the widget\n", encoding="utf-8"
        )
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) == "Build the widget"

    def test_returns_none_for_no_file(self) -> None:
        """Return None when plan_file_path is None."""
        assert extract_pr_title(None) is None

    def test_returns_none_for_nonexistent_file(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when file doesn't exist."""
        nonexistent = tmp_path / "does_not_exist.md"
        assert extract_pr_title(nonexistent) is None

    def test_returns_none_for_empty_file(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when file is empty."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) is None

    def test_returns_none_when_no_title_found(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """Return None when no valid title pattern found."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text(
            "Some random content\nwithout any headings\nor task section.", encoding="utf-8"
        )
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) is None

    def test_prefers_h1_over_task_section(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None:
        """H1 heading takes precedence over ## Task section."""
        plan_file = tmp_path / "plan.md"
        plan_file.write_text("# Better Title\n\n## Task\nTask description\n", encoding="utf-8")
        assert extract_pr_title(plan_file) == "Better Title""}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_exit_plan_mode_hook.py","old_string":"    def test_plan_saved_marker_blocks_with_step2(self) -> None:
        """Plan-saved marker blocks exit with Step 2 prompt and deletes the marker."""
        result = determine_exit_action(
            HookInput.for_test(
                plan_saved_marker_exists=True,
                plan_saved_plan_number=42,
                plan_file_path=Path("/some/plan.md"),
            )
        )
        assert result.action == ExitAction.BLOCK
        assert "PR #42 saved" in result.message
        assert "erk br co --for-plan 42" in result.message
        assert "erk pr dispatch 42" in result.message
        assert "Session complete" in result.message
        assert result.delete_plan_saved_marker is True
        assert result.delete_implement_now_marker is False

    def test_plan_saved_marker_without_plan_number_fallback(self) -> None:
        """Plan-saved marker without plan number uses fallback message."""
        result = determine_exit_action(
            HookInput.for_test(
                plan_saved_marker_exists=True,
                plan_saved_plan_number=None,
                plan_file_path=Path("/some/plan.md"),
            )
        )
        assert result.action == ExitAction.BLOCK
        assert "PR saved" in result.message
        assert "Planning session complete" in result.message
        assert result.delete_plan_saved_marker is True","new_string":"    def test_plan_saved_marker_blocks_with_step2(self) -> None:
        """Plan-saved marker blocks exit with Step 2 prompt and deletes the marker."""
        result = determine_exit_action(
            HookInput.for_test(
                plan_saved_marker_exists=True,
                plan_saved_pr_number=42,
                plan_file_path=Path("/some/plan.md"),
            )
        )
        assert result.action == ExitAction.BLOCK
        assert "PR #42 saved" in result.message
        assert "erk br co --for-plan 42" in result.message
        assert "erk pr dispatch 42" in result.message
        assert "Session complete" in result.message
        assert result.delete_plan_saved_marker is True
        assert result.delete_implement_now_marker is False

    def test_plan_saved_marker_without_plan_number_fallback(self) -> None:
        """Plan-saved marker without plan number uses fallback message."""
        result = determine_exit_action(
            HookInput.for_test(
                plan_saved_marker_exists=True,
                plan_saved_pr_number=None,
                plan_file_path=Path("/some/plan.md"),
            )
        )
        assert result.action == ExitAction.BLOCK
        assert "PR saved" in result.message
        assert "Planning session complete" in result.message
        assert result.delete_plan_saved_marker is True"}

These tests invoke `land-execute` command which fails with "TypeError: land_execute() missing 1 required keyword-only argument: 'linked_pr_number'" because Click cannot handle the duplicate `--pr-number` option name and doesn't pass the second parameter.

session.assistant:
I see - the tests use `--pr-number=123` which is the FIRST option (the required one for "PR number to merge"). The duplicate was the SECOND `--pr-number` option (which was the renamed `--plan-number` for "Linked PR number"). Now that we renamed the second one to `--linked-pr-number`, the tests should work since they only pass the first `--pr-number`.

session.tool_result:
## Summary
**Status: FAILED** - Multiple failures in CI. Here are the results:
### Prettier Format Check FAILED: Code style issues found in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Action:** Run Prettier with --write to fix formatting.
### Ruff Lint & Format Check PASSED: All checks passed!
### Exec Reference Check PASSED: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date
### Type Checker (ty) FAILED: 9 unresolved-attribute errors found
Key issues with attribute access: - **objective_save_to_issue.py:205,210,226,245,247,263,264** - `CreateObjectiveIssueResult` has no attributes `pr_number` and `pr_url` - **push_and_create_pr.py:88** - `SubmitState & ~SubmitError` has no attribute `pr_id` - **register_one_shot_plan.py:48** - Missing required parameter `pr_number` for `write_dispatch_metadata`
### Unit Tests (pytest) FAILED: **49 failed, 5962 passed in 14.95s**
Primary failure pattern: `plan_number` vs `pr_number` parameter mismatch and missing `plan_id` attributes.
... [17 lines omitted] ...
**Key failures:** 1. **objective_save_to_issue.py** - Type attribute errors (pr_number, pr_url expected on CreateObjectiveIssueResult) 2. **push_and_create_pr.py** - Type attribute error (pr_id expected) 4. **Multiple test files** - `plan_number` parameter errors in validate_plan_format() and missing `plan_id` attribute on PrViewResult ### File Paths with Failures
session.assistant:
Progress - we're down from 76 failures to 49. Let me categorize and fix the remaining issues:
1. **Prettier formatting** - 2 docs files, not related to our changes. Ignore. 2. **ty errors**: - `objective_save_to_issue.py` - `result.pr_number` and `result.pr_url` on `CreateObjectiveIssueResult` - this is an erk_shared type that still has the old names - `push_and_create_pr.py` - `SubmitState.pr_id` - this is a SubmitState field from submit_pipeline (out of scope 3.6.2) - `register_one_shot_plan.py` - Missing `pr_number` param in `write_dispatch_metadata` 3. **Test failures**: - `validate_plan_format()` - renamed `plan_number` to `pr_number` but callers in tests still use old name - `PrViewResult` missing `plan_id` → `pr_id` - tests construct with old name - `PlannedPRBackend` missing `resolve_pr_id_for_branch` - agents renamed the wrong thing
Let me fix these issues systematically:
session.tool_result:
